description_long: This is a freestanding wooden cabinet with a two-tone finish, featuring a dark brown countertop and a lighter beige body. The front side has two paneled doors with round knobs, providing access to a spacious interior compartment. The countertop has a U-shaped cutout, likely designed to accommodate a sink or similar fixture, making it suitable for use as a vanity or utility cabinet. The sides are solid panels matching the beige color of the front, while the back is open, revealing the wooden interior and support structure. The cabinet stands on four sturdy legs and has a robust, traditional appearance. No glass panels or visible contents are present, and the overall construction suggests durability and functionality for urban environments such as garages, workshops, or outdoor patios.
description: A sturdy, two-tone wooden cabinet with a dark brown U-shaped countertop and beige paneled doors, designed for utility or vanity use. The open back and solid construction make it suitable for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing two beige paneled doors with round knobs and the dark brown U-shaped countertop.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid beige panel and the thickness of the dark brown countertop.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the open back, wooden interior, and support structure beneath the countertop.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a matching solid beige panel and visible countertop edge.
